notifications.title: LAB SAFETY BASICS
notifications.detail: Sreelakshmi Buddharaju has posted the following discussion in IB MYP Sciences (MYP Year 1) C : We already discussed these in criterion B LAB SAFETY BASICS Safety is everyone's responsibility. Before the Experiment ✔ Read all instructions carefully. ✔ Listen to your teacher. ✔ Tie back long hair. ✔ Wear safety goggles and a lab coat if required. During the Experiment ✔ Follow instructions carefully. ✔ Handle equipment gently. ✔ Use chemicals only as directed. ✔ Keep your work area neat. ✔ Never taste or smell chemicals unless instructed. ✔ Do not run or play in the laboratory. ✔ Report spills or accidents immediately. After the Experiment ✔ Turn off equipment if instructed. ✔ Clean your workspace. ✔ Wash your hands. ✔ Return equipment to its proper place.
